title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group!
